analysis_plan_ref.anchor: SS2.4 (endpoints and decision rules) + SS2.5 (efficiency ledger); build operationalisation PROPOSED-ASM-1440..1459 (poc/rules-2/asm-1440-1459.json)

arms_mandatory_baselines: B0 plain host (R1 SmolLM2-135M; R2 360M on the authorized second tier): no fine-tune, no engine — the floor and headroom gate. REWORK-1 (review fix 1): B0 scores S-out on the BYTE-IDENTICAL rules-2 prompt every arm shares (no per-arm padding; the former ASM-1127 token-matching is removed; shared prompt-surface sha recorded in the results bytes) with the same 24-option decode, and is additionally scored on the common 23-option rules-1 surface (cell=entailed23) for the s3' gap fraction

B1 exposure control: LoRA on families 1+3 ONLY (stated + refusal; NO entailments), size-matched to B2 via the pinned b1-upsample list — separates 'saw the format/domain' from 'saw the inference' (PROPOSED-ASM-1425/1447)
B2 TREATMENT: LoRA on families 1+2+3 (stated + ENGINE-MATERIALISED CLOSURE + refusal) — the internalisation claim carrier, S-out only (PROPOSED-ASM-1422/1423)
B3 proof-augmented variant: B2 with the one-line why() proof rendered as a TRAINING-prompt block — rationale-distillation scaffold, DESCRIPTIVE only (MD-R2-4; deviation disclosed PROPOSED-ASM-1452)

B4 engine-at-inference comparator: RULES-1-B A3 VERBATIM (imported sha-pinned rules-1-b rules1_runner bytes 1f423ac0...; REWORK-2: rules-1's GPU run was VOIDED 2026-07-12 for a degenerate direction-ambiguous prompt frame and superseded by rules-1-b, whose direction-explicit frames rules-2 adopts across every arm; frozen R1 host + twin verify-retry k=4; f2bt SEED_BASE 20260710) on the identical S-out slice (PROPOSED-ASM-1450). REWORK-1 (review fix 1): the s3' B2-vs-B4 gap and its descriptive fraction are scored ONLY on the common 23-option surface — B2 (all FT seeds) and B0 additionally decode the RULES-1-B A1-verbatim prompt (rules-1-b direction-explicit frames, 23-word menu in the task header, no refusal option, byte-identical to B4's attempt-0 prompt) as cell=entailed23; contrasts never cross surfaces
B5 R3-alone (SmolLM2-1.7B, no fine-tune) on S-out — big-model efficiency comparator

c1p content control: LoRA on the LABEL-DERANGED closure (REWORK-1, review fix 2: family-2 train targets label-deranged within menu class, seed 20260713 — shuffled_answer != original_answer ASSERTED for EVERY item, 0/11,411 label-correct in the real build vs 3,090 under the former item-Sattolo; per-class label multiset/token count preserved exactly for rel23 (10,121 cells), the imbalanced binary mw2 class (1,290) carries a DISCLOSED 18-item complement-flip residual; identical corpus size) — the lift must collapse (PROPOSED-ASM-1426/1448)

c7 = the three-strata split itself: S-mem / S-held / S-out reported separately, NEVER pooled (PROPOSED-ASM-1436); S-held cover-cell string-recoverability DISCLOSED and stratified by kind (PROPOSED-ASM-1444)

c8 train-bytes projection: GS-family flat lookup (QA index + aligned fact-line index, no joins) over the pinned B2 training bytes — CPU instrument gate EXECUTED 2026-07-12: S-out recovery 0/858 = 0.0 <= ceiling 0.10, GATE PASS; S-mem 1.0 (lookup, as designed); artifact poc/rules-2/results/c8-result.json sha cb3fecd3... (rework-2 regeneration from the token-guard materialiser bytes; gate PASS 0/858 unchanged) (PROPOSED-ASM-1427/1445)

c4 trivial floors (descriptive, carried in the c8 artifact): abstain-all 0.0; answer-all majority word 0.5047 on the binary-gold S-out slice — floors bracket absolute accuracies; the primary is a paired lift
A6 decode-mask: stays DEFERRED (closed 23-word surface; DV-5 tautology condition unchanged; |L| ledger mandatory if it ever runs — PROPOSED-ASM-1435, MD-R2-6)
c5 knull-sourced-closure fine-tune: NOT in this campaign; ASM-1138 claim cap carries verbatim (PROPOSED-ASM-1438, MD-R2-8)

dependent_vars.definition: exact match against the pinned third-party CLUTRR gold relation word (closed 23-word vocabulary + named refusal option; gold predates the kernel)
dependent_vars.name: item_correct_ext

dependent_vars.definition: named fail-closed refusal option chosen ('cannot be determined from these facts'); TRAINED and SCORED (PROPOSED-ASM-1431/1446)
dependent_vars.name: refused

dependent_vars.definition: S-out entailed-cell accuracy vs third-party gold (V component)
dependent_vars.name: accuracy

dependent_vars.definition: peak host memory PER ARM/RUNG (V component; REWORK-1 review fix 4): measured per cell — CUDA allocator peak (reset per cell) on GPU, process peak RSS (instrument named per entry) on CPU — recorded in results.eval_ledger/training_ledger and emitted per arm/rung in /analysis/memory + /analysis/efficiency_ledger
dependent_vars.name: memory

dependent_vars.definition: per-item inference cost PER ARM/RUNG on the identical S-out slice (REWORK-1 review fix 4): mean FLOPs (formula) + mean tokens + per-query USD (flops-share attribution, disclosed) per arm/rung; B4 additionally mean/total attempts (k<=4) + engine CPU us; B2 one forward pass k=1 zero engine dependency; break-even N* on the common 23-option surface
dependent_vars.name: inference_compute

dependent_vars.definition: measured LoRA training cost PER ARM/RUNG (REWORK-1 review fix 4): wall GPU-h, USD, tokens_seen, 6*N*T FLOPs formula and peak memory per arm/rung/seed (results.training_ledger) + the one-off closure materialisation (4.4 s CPU measured) — fills the slot rules-1 fixed at 0 (PROPOSED-ASM-1429)
dependent_vars.name: training_compute

assumptions.claim: Design verbatim from docs/next/design/rules-2-train-time.md (PROPOSED-ASM-1420..1439) with the build operationalisations PROPOSED-ASM-1440..1459 (emitted, pending central registration)

Training corpus = data/rules2-train (21,780 examples; 19,931 train / 1,249 sheld / 600 dev; world-v0 kinship inventory + 700 fresh-seed synthetic families, seed 20260712), generated $0-CPU by the PINNED RULES-1 twin engine, kot-corpus-hash 3465e63d... (rework-2 regeneration, review fix 5: the name-collision guard is TOKEN-level, excluding the wv0-elvis-presley component whose text carries the CLUTRR lexicon tokens Gladys/Lisa; exclusion counted AND listed in the corpus manifest)

Cost bands from --dry-plan on actual corpus chars (rework-2: sharded launch): R1 tier est $9.28 / worst $13.92 (12.66 worst GPU-h across 17 independent parallel jobs, worst single job 1.26 h vs the 12 h Modal function timeout); R2 tier (coordinator-authorized second launch) worst $11.78 across 7 jobs; combined worst $25.70 inside the $35 outer ceiling [PROPOSED-ASM-1454]

n_planned.generations_estimate: ~100k forced-choice scorings (R1 tier: 958 S-out x 24 options x 3 FT seeds x 4 FT arms + eval-only arms + strata/repeat on first seeds + the gap23 common 23-option surface: 858 x 23 x (3 B2 seeds + B0))

endpoints.test: INTERNALISATION PRIMARY (PROPOSED-ASM-1424, REWORK-1 review fix 3): B2 - B0 on S-out entailed cells (rung R1) vs the pinned third-party CLUTRR gold, byte-identical prompts (rules-1-b direction-explicit surface) + 24-option decode; TWO-STAGE paired bootstrap B=10000 (PRNG seed 20260712) resampling the FT-seed axis (cluster, per arm) then items, BCa, one-sided alpha=0.05, per-item FT-seed-mean statistic (never best-of-seeds, PROPOSED-ASM-1439). REGISTERED SESOI 0.05 decision band: PASS requires LB > 0.05; KILL-d fires on LB <= 0; 0 < LB <= 0.05 is the pre-registered INCONCLUSIVE band (neither pass nor kill).

s1' (PROPOSED-ASM-1426, REWORK-1): c1p LABEL-deranged-closure recovery — joint two-stage bootstrap of (c1p-B0)/(B2-B0) on shared items (non-positive B2-lift replicates count conservatively as recovery >= ceiling); H1: recovery < 0.30; UB95 reported; pass = REAL Holm step-down rejection within {s1p,s2p,s3p,s4p} (/analysis/holm).

s2' (PROPOSED-ASM-1425, REWORK-1): B2 - B1 on S-out (byte-identical prompts, 24-option decode), seed+item two-stage BCa; H1: diff > 0; LB95 reported; pass = REAL Holm step-down rejection (/analysis/holm).

s3' (PROPOSED-ASM-1428, REWORK-1 review fix 1): noninferiority of B2 (no engine, k=1) vs B4 (A3 verbatim, k=4) scored ONLY on the COMMON 23-option surface (B2 cell=entailed23 on the rules-1-b A1-verbatim prompt vs B4's A3 rows), absolute margin 0.05; H1: diff > -0.05, seed+item two-stage BCa; CONDITIONAL on the RULES-1-B A3 lift LB > 0 (--rules1-primary-lb; unevaluable => null, never a fail, and s3p DROPS OUT of the Holm family with m adjusting); pass = REAL Holm rejection; descriptive companion gap fraction (B2-B0)/(B4-B0) on the same common surface.

s4' Herron degradation guard (PROPOSED-ASM-1430, REWORK-1): B2 stated-cell accuracy AND refusal correctness each vs the point-estimate-better of B0/B1 (paired, disclosed reference); point-estimate breach beyond 0.05 sets /analysis/s4p_side_effect_flag (SIDE-EFFECT: caps deployment-shaped language) without touching the primary; s4p_pass = REAL Holm rejection of the intersection-union breach null (p = max of the two component one-sided bootstrap ps, H1: each delta > -0.05) AND no point-estimate breach.

G1 (PROPOSED-ASM-1437): every RULES-1 pin byte-exact (twin 399fcd8d..., rules.n3 9857da89..., certificate e0071e9e... with SUCCESS+gates+no-KILL-a, corpus digests, imported rules1_runner/f2bt bytes); verified fail-closed by the runner, mock included; failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID, no spend.

G2 (PROPOSED-ASM-1427/1445): the train-bytes projection must NOT recover S-out above the 0.10 ceiling. EXECUTED 2026-07-12 at $0 CPU: 0/858 recovered (0.0) — gate PASS pinned in c8-result.json sha cb3fecd3...; the freeze re-verifies reproduction from the pinned materialiser bytes.
G3: acc(B0, S-out, R1) <= 0.85 — a saturated floor cannot measure a lift => INSTRUMENT-INVALID.

G4 (PROPOSED-ASM-1439/1451): per-arm in-process byte-identical repeat over the pinned first-200-by-sha S-out subsample (first seed); B4 exempt (rules-1 decision-sha double-run discipline instead, PROPOSED-ASM-1450).

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Binding on any outcome: two fine-tuned rungs (135M, 360M) license a SIGN, not a slope; R3 is a no-fine-tune comparator only. Every claim is scoped to: gold-parse-only prompt-supplied facts (no NL-robustness claim; the l3a-parse wall stands); THIS closed rule inventory and THIS kinship vertical (world-v0 + fresh-seed synthetic expansion, axioms-v0 + axioms-kinship-v1, nsk1-clutrr STRICTLY eval-side CC-BY-NC-4.0 per ASM-1125/1421); LoRA at the pinned hyperparameters (r16/a32/lr2e-4/2 epochs, fp32) — no claim about other fine-tuning regimes; proof depth <= 4 (ASM-1160). Claim assignment (PROPOSED-ASM-1423): S-mem accuracy is lookup-in-weights (the A4 analog one level up), NEVER inference; S-held is a partial-generalisation descriptive with its cover-cell string-recoverability disclosed (PROPOSED-ASM-1444); ONLY S-out — with c8 failing to reproduce it and c1p collapsing — supports 'internalised the inference'. CLAIM CAP (PROPOSED-ASM-1438, extends ASM-1138): until the knull-sourced-closure fine-tune (c5 analog) runs, any positive result is 'engine-materialised entailments are internalisable by a small host', NEVER 'kernel-specific value'. The efficiency ledger is a price table with NO direction presumed (PROPOSED-ASM-1429): the engine's marginal compute is microseconds on CPU and the ledger may show the engine cheaper at any realistic N, in which case the train slot's efficiency case rests only on the k=4->k=1 resample reduction and removal of the engine as a deployment dependency. A6 decode-mask stays deferred (PROPOSED-ASM-1435).
hypotheses: H-R2-1 (load-bearing, the internalisation claim): LoRA fine-tuning on the engine-materialised closure lifts the small host on OUT-OF-WORLD entailed queries with no engine at inference — B2 - B0 on S-out vs pinned third-party CLUTRR gold, paired item BCa one-sided 95% LB > 0 (PROPOSED-ASM-1424).

H-R2-2 (content, s1'): the lift is closure-CONTENT-driven — a LABEL-deranged closure at identical bulk (every trained family-2 target differs from the engine answer; per-class label multisets preserved up to the disclosed 18-item mw2 residual) must not retain it (recovery UB95 < 0.30, Holm-corrected, PROPOSED-ASM-1426/1448).
H-R2-3 (exposure, s2'): the lift exceeds format/domain exposure — B2 - B1 LB > 0 (PROPOSED-ASM-1425).

H-R2-4 (gap closure, s3', conditional): B2 (k=1, no engine) is noninferior to B4 (A3 engine-at-inference, k=4) at margin 0.05 — conditional on RULES-1-B's A3 lift having been positive (PROPOSED-ASM-1428).
CLAIM CAP: PROPOSED-ASM-1438 — 'engine-materialised entailments are internalisable', never 'kernel-specific value', pending the knull-closure ablation (issue #6).
kill_criterion_verbatim: KILL-d (PROPOSED-ASM-1424, REWORK-1): the primary B2 - B0 seed+item two-stage BCa one-sided 95% LB <= 0 on S-out entailed cells vs third-party CLUTRR gold (byte-identical prompts, 24-option decode); the registered SESOI 0.05 completes the band — PASS only on LB > 0.05, and 0 < LB <= 0.05 is INCONCLUSIVE (neither pass nor kill) => fine-tuning on the materialised closure does not internalise the inference; the closure remains a data product; the engine remains required at inference; route back to the RULES-1 memory-slot architecture as the standing position; NO model claim. Pre-GPU kills: G1 pin failure, G2 c8 lookup-recovery > 0.10 ceiling (split broken), or the PROPOSED-ASM-1420 sequencing gate on the RULES-1-B readout (rules-1 VOIDED + superseded 2026-07-12; RULES-1-B KILL-b => no auto-run, explicit maintainer re-authorization with s3' struck; RULES-1-B INSTRUMENT-INVALID/INCONCLUSIVE => blocked, no spend). Secondary kill discipline: if s1p recovery UB95 >= 0.30 the lift is not content-driven and no content claim survives.

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

pins.harness_manifest: PINNED-AT-INPUTS: the staged-bytes manifest sha printed by poc/rules-2/modal/modal_rules2.py --print-manifest (56c713d44b90ddc47d469b63ac2614c0ab72cf60be3db2f7c5f59b6baf8bc454 at rework-2 build time 2026-07-12; supersedes the rework-1 bd01d66d... value — rework-2 rebuilt the prompt surface on the RULES-1-B frame contract after the 2026-07-12 VOID of rules-1's GPU run, repinned the imported rules1_runner bytes to the rules-1-b freeze, added the token-level name-collision guard corpus regeneration, made the G1 pin gate hash-before-import, and sharded the launch) — the coordinator freeze records the value current at freeze; ANY staged-byte change after that requires a correction record (PROPOSED-ASM-1459); the pinned green-mock artifact (results/mock-validation.json) must carry the SAME sha or the wrapper refuses to launch

runner_constraints.artifact_notes: c8-result = THE PINNED PASSED G2 GATE (train-bytes projection, $0 CPU, 2026-07-12, rework-2 regeneration sha cb3fecd3...): S-out 0/858 recovered (ceiling 0.10, PASS); S-mem projection 1.0 (lookup by construction — the honest anchor); S-held by kind {chain 0/125, cover 142/142 DISCLOSED string-leak via family-1 pair sharing, typing 0/33}; c4 floors abstain 0.0 / majority 0.5047. data/rules2-train = 21,780 examples (19,931 train / 1,249 sheld / 600 dev; kinds: 5,840 stated, 5,720 chain, 5,840 cover, 1,460 typing, 2,920 refusal), generated deterministically by the pinned twin engine in ~5 s CPU; exclusion ledger disclosed in its manifest (3 conflict components = world-v0 planted violations; 1 TOKEN-level name-collision component wv0-elvis-presley, listed by id — review fix 5; 117 out-of-inventory records). mock-validation.json = the PINNED GREEN MOCK (review fix 9): monolithic + 13-shard mock runs, merge, pinned-analysis parity (modulo disclosed process-measured metrics), verdict-mapping resolution and both tier dry-plans, tied to the staged-bytes sha 56c713d4....
runner_constraints.budget_note: DEFAULT R1 tier: dry-plan (actual corpus chars, A10G, rework-2 sharded) est $9.28 / worst $13.92 (12.66 worst GPU-h summed over 17 independent jobs; worst single job 1.26 h vs the 12 h Modal function timeout) vs usd_cap $18 — OK. The R2 rung (B0/B1/B2, MD-R2-3a) is a coordinator-authorized SECOND launch (--rungs R2 --authorize-r2, 7 jobs, worst $11.78): combined worst $25.70, inside the $35 outer ceiling, matching the design's $25-35 worst-case band; dry-plan fails closed per tier and per job. SEQUENCING (PROPOSED-ASM-1420): no GPU launch until the RULES-1-B GPU readout exists and its branch permits RULES-2; enforced programmatically (modal_rules2._launch_gates).
runner_constraints.hardware: single A10G (Modal), fp32 train + eval, greedy forced-choice; CPU-only for materialisation, c8, c4 and B4 control cells
runner_constraints.harness: poc/rules-2 (rules2_runner.py + merge_shards.py + validate_mock.py; REWORK-2 surfaces: the RULES-1-B frame contract everywhere — menu inside the task header, direction-explicit infill answer cue rendered per cell from the question's own closed template ('{b} is {a}''s' for relation questions, '{e} is a' for typing questions, fail-closed ERR_CUE), applied identically at TRAIN and EVAL time, so prompts stay byte-identical across all rules-2 arms with the uniform 24-option decode; the refusal option decodes verbatim after the infill cue — a marked continuation, uniform across arms and train/eval, disclosed; common 23-option entailed23 cells for the B2/B4 gap on the rules-1-b A1-verbatim surface; B4 drivers + verbaliser + gold-leak guard imported BYTE-IDENTICAL from the rules-1-b poc/rules-1/rules1_runner.py under sha pin 1f423ac0...; ALL imported-module pins verified on RAW BYTES BEFORE import (review fix 6); f2bt HFLM scorer bytes; LoRA via peft in the pinned image poc/rules-2/modal/requirements-image.txt — poc/modal/requirements-image.txt untouched). SHARDED LAUNCH (review fix 9): 17 independent R1-tier Modal jobs (one per FT arm x seed, per B4 seed, per eval-only arm; --print-jobs), spawned in parallel and mergeable across Modal accounts; merge_shards.py reconstructs the canonical results pair under fail-closed cross-shard pin/surface/coverage assertions (mock-proven analysis parity with the monolithic path modulo process-measured metrics). Modal hygiene: launch long runs nohup+setsid; 'modal app stop ap-<id>' after killing any client (bd memory).
runner_constraints.kernel_arm: the treatment content is the PINNED RULES-1 twin engine's closure over the training default world — provenance chain terminates in the certified engine (certificate e0071e9e..., 858/858 vs third-party gold, C_dec(entailed)=0.0); no encoder ALGORITHM_VERSION change, no frozen object modified, no new axiom minting (PROPOSED-ASM-1437).
runner_constraints.roles: frozen-design discipline: this DRAFT was authored by the build role (fable-build-1, 2026-07-12) and REWORKED TWICE the same day: rework-1 (cross-vendor review fixes 1-4: byte-identical 24-option surface, label-derangement, SESOI band + seed-aware REAL Holm, per-arm/rung efficiency ledger) and rework-2 (fable-build-2; review fixes 5, 6, 9 + the rules-1-b supersede: token-level name guard with corpus/c8 regeneration, hash-before-import pin gate, sharded parallel launch with programmatic launch gates and the PINNED green-mock artifact results/mock-validation.json, and the prompt surface rebuilt on the rules-1-b direction-explicit frames after rules-1's GPU run was VOIDED for exactly the frame defect rules-2 would otherwise have inherited). The corrected ASM block poc/rules-2/asm-1440-1459.json supersedes previously emitted rows; FREEZE is the coordinator's (prereg-freeze.py after registering PROPOSED-ASM-1420..1459 centrally, re-verifying every sha, regenerating rules2-train + c8 from the pinned materialiser bytes, and running the pre-freeze skeptic pass); the run is the experiment-runner role's; grading is analysis/rules_2.py + verdict-gen; audit is the cross-vendor auditor. NO feasibility conclusion is stated in this record.

title: RULES-2 (train-time closure materialisation) — does LoRA fine-tuning a small host on the DEFAULT world's engine-materialised closure INTERNALISE the inference, i.e. lift out-of-world entailed-query accuracy (S-out, fresh-name CLUTRR items, third-party gold, NO engine at inference) over the plain host, with the memorisation split (S-mem/S-held/S-out), the c8 train-bytes projection gate ($0 CPU, EXECUTED: PASS 0/858) and the label-deranged-closure control making lookup unable to fake it? Design: docs/next/design/rules-2-train-time.md; sequencing-gated on the RULES-1-B GPU readout (PROPOSED-ASM-1420; rules-1's GPU run was VOIDED 2026-07-12 and superseded by rules-1-b).
